days.label: Week 1 - Day 1 Accumulation
warmup: Complete 3 rounds in total inbetween warm up sets:
1) Plate turtle squat x10
2) Adductor rock back x10 each side
3) PVC lat stretch x 60 seconds split into 6x10s holds
4) Supinated dead hang x 20-30s
5) Knee to wall glides x 20 each leg

blocks.name: Bottom up Frontsquat
blocks.notes:
Based off Clean 1RM
5 second eccentric on each rep
(Can be changed to 5s Pause Frontsquat if equipment does not allow you to perform bottom up frontsquats)
60% 1x5
65% 1x5
70% 1x5
Rest up to 120s between sets

blocks.name: Front Squat
blocks.notes:
Based off front squat 1RM
60% 1x5
65% 1x5
70% 1x5
Rest up to 120s between sets

blocks.name: Quarter Front Squat
blocks.notes:
Based off Back Squat 1RM
3 second eccentric on each rep
60% 1x5
65% 1x5
70% 1x5
Rest up to 120s between sets

days.label: Week 1 - Day 2 Accumulation
warmup: Back squat warm up
complete 3 rounds in a continuous fashion
Adductor rock backs x10 each side
Frog rocks x10
Squat rocks x10 each side
Front foot elevated ankle glides x10 each side

blocks.name: Bottom up Back Squat
blocks.notes:
Based off front squat 1RM
5 second eccentric on each rep
(Can be changed to 5s pause back squat if equipment does not allow you to perform bottom up back squats)
60% 1x5
65% 1x5
70% 1x5
Rest up to 120s between sets

blocks.name: Back Squat
blocks.notes:
Based off Back Squat 1RM

65% 1x5
70% 1x5
Rest up to 120s between sets

blocks.name: Quarter Back Squat

90% 1x5
Rest up to 120s between sets

days.label: Week 10 - Day 1 Test Week
warmup: Complete 3 rounds in total inbetween warm up sets:
1) Alternate squat rocks x20 in total
2) Frog rocks x20
3) Bird dog isometric x 30 seconds each side
4) Dead bug isometric x 30 seconds each side

blocks.name: Back Squat
blocks.notes:
Take up to 25 minutes to build up to a max for the day.
No more than 3 misses at any given load
Once a max is established complete the following sets and reps:
85% 2x2, 80% 3x3
aim for 120-180s rest between sets

days.label: Week 10 - Day 2 Test Week
warmup: Complete 3 rounds in total inbetween warm up sets:
1) Plate turtle squat x10
2) Adductor rock back x10 each side
3) PVC lat stretch x 60 secondds split into 6x10s holds
4) Supinated dead hang x 20-30s
5) Knee to wall glides x 20 each leg

blocks.name: Front Squat
blocks.notes:
Take up to 25 minutes to build up to a max for the day.
No more than 3 misses at any given load
Once a max is established complete the following sets and reps:
85% 2x2, 80% 3x3
aim for 120-180s rest between sets

days.label: Week 10 - Day 3 Test Week
warmup: clean warm up
Perform 2-3 rounds of each exercise in a continuous circuit fashion until all rounds are completed
Barbell turtle squat x6
Barbell front rack glides x12 each arm
Dynamic Prayer stretch x12
Elevated PVC cat-camel x12

blocks.name: Front Squat
blocks.notes:
option 1 -
Take up to 20 minutes to build up to a max for the day (retest).
No more than 3 misses at any given load.
Once a max is established complete the following sets and reps.
85% 1x2, 80% 1x2, 75% 1x3
Aim for 120-180s rest between sets
Option 2 -
Using the established front squat max from day 1 complete the following sets and reps.
50% 1x3, 60% 1x3, 70% 1x3, 75% 2x3, 80% 2x2, 85% 1x2
120-150s rest between sets

days.label: Week 10 - Day 4 Test Week
warmup: Back squat warm up
complete 3 rounds in a continuous fashion
Adductor rock backs x10 each side
Frog rocks x10
Squat rocks x10 each side
Front foot elevated ankle glides x10 each side

blocks.name: Back Squat
blocks.notes:
option 1 -
Take up to 20 minutes to build up to a max for the day (retest).
No more than 3 misses at any given load.
Once a max is established complete the following sets and reps.
85% 1x2, 80% 1x2, 75% 1x3
Aim for 120-180s rest between sets
Option 2 -
Using the established back squat max from day 1 complete the following sets and reps.
50% 1x3, 60% 1x3, 70% 1x3, 75% 2x3, 80% 2x2, 85% 1x2
120-150s rest between sets
